name: room-dashboard
description: Local pixel-room dashboard for OpenClaw multi-agent status.

scripts.dev: echo "Use frontend/backend workspace scripts for development"
scripts.build: cmd /c npm.cmd run build --workspace backend && cmd /c npm.cmd run build --workspace frontend
scripts.lint: cmd /c npm.cmd run lint --workspace backend && cmd /c npm.cmd run lint --workspace frontend
scripts.test: cmd /c npm.cmd run test --workspace backend && cmd /c npm.cmd run test --workspace frontend
scripts.verify: cmd /c npm.cmd run lint && cmd /c npm.cmd run build && cmd /c npm.cmd run test && node scripts/smoke-test.mjs
